title: Capesizes Schematics
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2024-12-10_capesizes-schematics_img_rgb-color-brs-shipbrokers-monogram-l_ee79606c8e74.png
Newbuilding market
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-12-10 113652.png | assets/2024-12-10_capesizes-schematics_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_ee190e6c42ed.png
BRS data shows a significant increase in the number of newbuilding orders for Capesizes in 2024. By end-November, 108 newbuilding orders were placed, 38% increase year-on-year. While there has been growing interest in lower emission dual-fuel technology, the volume of orders for such vessels remains limited.
